title: Today, I Just Want to Go Home
overview: Krai Andrey is the master of the clan named First Steps. Although he would prefer to retire, he can't find an opportunity or the right time to do so. Krai explains in detail how he ended up in this situation.

title: I Want to Leave It to Tino and Take It Easy
overview: Tino has received a mission from Krai. But before she can set out, she needs a few strong members for her group. Greg, Rhuda, and Gilbert are already ready.

title: I Want to Fly Straight Through the Sky
overview: Tino and her group are fighting against a phantom even before they enter the treasure chamber. In the process, they realize that their opponent is significantly stronger than level 3. Meanwhile, Krai rushes to them to save them from their terrible fate.

title: The Mysterious Mask Wants to Fight
overview: Krai and Tino's group wander through the White Wolf's building. The group believes that Krai knows where the exit is located. However, he is clueless. Then, they suddenly encounter the survivors they were trying to rescue.

title: I Want to Leave Everything to Ark
overview: A long time ago, Sitri entrusted Krai with one of her alchemy creations: a slime powerful enough to destroy all of Zebrudia. When Krai discovers the slime is missing, he scrambles to recover it before chaos ensues.

title: I Want to Sleep Instead of Taking Charge
overview: The Akashic Tower decides on an all out war against the hunters because they falsely believe that Krai found their facility. Independent of that, Krai's careless words cause a huge group of hunters to be sent to the White Wolf's Den.

title: The Akashic Tower Wants to Experiment
overview: Sitri is finally back, but instead of focusing on the slime, she gives Krai an ominous warning. That at this rate, the entire investigation team will perish. The lethal battle between hunters and the Akashic Tower has been kicked off!

title: I Want to Rush In When It's Over
overview: Sitri saves the day. Flustered, the Akashic Tower's members ignore Sophia's orders and self-destruct. As Sitri has figured out their headquarters, the hunters press on. Flick uses his lightning spell on them all, and for a moment it seems it's all over...

title: I Want to Teach Love and Peace
overview: The hunters are faced with chimeras and a giant golem. The intense battle suddenly comes to an end when Krai arrives. The next day Noctus and the other members of the Akashic Tower are finally reunited with Sophia. But she is acting strange, and then a certain someone appears...

title: I Want to Be Renowned in the Capital
overview: The Dragon Slayer Arnold Hail is level 7 and he proudly rolls into the capital with his party "Falling Fog", but Krai doesn't even show a shred of interest. Meanwhile, getting his relics charged is causing quite commotion...

title: The Falling Fog Wants Revenge
overview: The Falling Fog came to the capital to make a name for themselves, instead they get disgraced. To regain their honor, Arnold sets his sights on Krai, but he is preoccupied with how to repay his immense debt to Sitri. When chance brings them together, a fierce battle unfolds...

title: If Possible, I'd Like to Get It
overview: Krai discovers an exceptional relic that'll soon go to the auction. Since he really wants it, he contacts the seller directly. But that turns out to be Arnold, and Krai's clumsy negotiation skill backfires completely. Others people then butt in and the relic goes to the auction anyway...

title: I Want to Win the Bid No Matter What
overview: The auction has finally begun. Cry has racked up a huge amount of debt in order to bid on the one Noble Phantasm he was looking for, but his eyes are drawn to the many Noble Phantasms on the stage and his feelings are disturbed. As Cry's reason and patience reach their limits, what is brought into the venue is the Akasha Golem that Sitri wanted. Cry, who understood Sitori's feelings, gives up on the Noble Phantasm he was aiming for and goes into a big fight, throwing everything away to win the golem bid. An auction that brings together a variety of thoughts. How will it end?

title: I Want to Talk About My Memories
overview: After five years, Tino nostalgically recalls his first encounter with the Grieving Souls and Krai.

title: At This Rate, I'd Rather Be Somewhere Else
overview: House Gradis directly requests Krai for a job. To get out of it he goes on vacation.

title: I Want to Leave the City's Peace to You
overview: Krai enjoys his vacation, but Arnold who's in pursuit him is having the worst time.

title: I'll Pass on the Strong Monsters
overview: Krai's vacation continues, and so do the hardships for Arnold and the others chasing him.

title: I Want to Soak It Up in the Hot Springs
overview: Krai and the rest finally made it to the hot springs. Now he can enjoy the all luxuries, or can he?

title: Somehow or Another, I'd Like to Get Out
overview: Krai's vacation gets interrupted again, now the Barrel bandit gang and underground people enter the fray too.

title: I Want to Hand Out Gifts to Everyone
overview: The Gathering of the White Blades was postponed so Krai has to attend. Of course it gets disrupted.

title: I'd Rather Skip the Escort Quest
overview: In order to protect the Emperor, Krai assembles a team. The first day's uneventful, but it's not quite over.

title: The Nine-Tailed Fox Wants to Move in the Shadows
I'm Grateful for the Assistance of My Friends
overview: Friendly ghosts come to help Krai, and Telm reveals his true motives.

title: I Want to Have a Big Laugh at the End
overview: The airship gets locked in the sky by a great force even Liz and Luke can't penetrate. Who's behind it?
